targets.notes: Company commits to achieve net-zero annual carbon emissions across its business by 2040 under The Climate Pledge.
targets.title: Net-zero carbon emissions by 2040 (The Climate Pledge)

targets.boundary: electricity use across Amazon's global operations
targets.notes: Amazon aims to power all of its operations with 100% renewable energy by 2025.
targets.title: 100% renewable energy for operations by 2025
targets.unit: % of electricity consumption from renewable energy

targets.notes: Under the Shipment Zero initiative, Amazon targets 50% of all customer shipments to be net-zero carbon by 2030.
targets.title: 50% of Amazon shipments net-zero carbon by 2030 (Shipment Zero)
targets.unit: % of Amazon shipments that are net-zero carbon
